title: Deriv Public WebSocket API Reference - Your 8 Instruments
note: app_id 1089 is Deriv's public demo app id; register your own at api.deriv.com for production use. Market data (ticks, candles, active_symbols) requires NO authentication.

list_all_symbols.purpose: Verify current symbol codes and market open status

live_ticks_stream.purpose: Real-time price stream (~1 tick / 2s on synthetics)

candles_history.purpose: OHLC candles for TA (granularity in seconds: 60=M1, 300=M5, 900=M15, 3600=H1, 14400=H4, 86400=D1)

live_candles_stream.purpose: Streaming OHLC updates for live chart/indicator computation

server_time.purpose: Sync clock (Deriv uses epoch UTC; SAST = UTC+2)

trading_times.purpose: Check open/close times for forex/gold symbols on a given date

practical_notes: Synthetics (R_50/R_75/R_100) stream 24/7/365 - use them to test your TA code any time
Forex/gold symbols return 'market is closed' responses on weekends - handle gracefully
Epoch timestamps are UTC: add 2 hours for SAST when bucketing candles by session
For indicator work pull at least 300 candles so EMA200 is fully seeded
Rate limits apply per connection - batch history requests, subscribe once per symbol
